name: Brass Swivel Vertical Wall Hook - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Keep your clothes and accessories close at hand using this Brass Vertical Wall Hook from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made from metal with an antique brass finish for a touch of shine, this vertical wall hook provides ample space for hanging everyday items, including hats, purses, scarves, and more. Ideal for entryway, bathroom or closet, the brass rail comes with multiple hooks to help keep your area tidy and clutter-free.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
